# Click2Call

> Click2Call is an Australian business communications provider specializing in AI-enhanced Cloud PBX, VoIP, and SIP Trunking services. We help businesses of all sizes across Australia to modernize their phone systems, reduce costs, and improve customer interactions with intelligent voice tools.

## Core Services

- **Cloud PBX**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/cloud-pbx.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/cloud-pbx.html) - A fully-featured, hardware-free business phone system hosted in the cloud.
- **AI Voice Tools**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/ai-voice-tools.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/ai-voice-tools.html) - Tools for call transcription, sentiment analysis, and smart routing.
- **AI Receptionist**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/ai-receptionist.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/ai-receptionist.html) - A 24/7 conversational AI to answer and direct calls.
- **Microsoft Teams Calling**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/microsoft-teams-calling.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/microsoft-teams-calling.html) - Enables external calls directly from the Microsoft Teams interface via Direct Routing.
- **SIP Trunks**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/sip-trunks.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/sip-trunks.html) - A modern, flexible replacement for traditional ISDN phone lines.

## Key Pages

- **Pricing**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/pricing.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/pricing.html) - Transparent pricing for all services.
- **VoIP Australia**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-australia.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-australia.html) - Our main national landing page for VoIP services.
- **VoIP Sydney**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-sydney.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-sydney.html) - VoIP phone systems for Sydney businesses. Local 02 numbers, self-serve setup, no lock-in contract.
- **VoIP Melbourne**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-melbourne.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-melbourne.html) - VoIP phone systems for Melbourne businesses. Local 03 numbers, self-serve setup, no lock-in contract.
- **VoIP Brisbane**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-brisbane.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-brisbane.html) - VoIP phone systems for Brisbane businesses. Local 07 numbers, self-serve setup, no lock-in contract.
- **VoIP Gold Coast**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-gold-coast.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-gold-coast.html) - VoIP phone systems for Gold Coast businesses. Local 07 numbers, self-serve setup, no lock-in contract.
- **VoIP Perth**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-perth.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-perth.html) - VoIP phone systems for Perth businesses. Local 08 numbers, self-serve setup, no lock-in contract.
- **VoIP Adelaide**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-adelaide.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-adelaide.html) - VoIP phone systems for Adelaide businesses. Local 08 numbers, self-serve setup, no lock-in contract.
- **VoIP Canberra**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-canberra.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-canberra.html) - VoIP phone systems for Canberra businesses. Local 02 numbers, self-serve setup, no lock-in contract.
- **VoIP Newcastle**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-newcastle.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-newcastle.html) - VoIP phone systems for Newcastle businesses. Local 02 numbers, self-serve setup, no lock-in contract.
- VoIP Hobart: https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-hobart.html
- **VoIP Wollongong**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-wollongong.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/voip-wollongong.html) - VoIP phone systems for Wollongong businesses. Local 02 numbers, self-serve setup, no lock-in contract.
- **FAQ**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/faq.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/faq.html) - A comprehensive list of frequently asked questions.

## About the Business

- **Legal Name**: Bcom Services Pty Ltd
- **Trading Name**: Click2Call
- **ABN**: 92 636 893 108
- **Phone**: 1300 884 879
- **Email**: click2call@bcomservices.com
- **Coverage**: Australia-wide

## Pricing (ex GST, AUD)

Cloud PBX Plans — per plan/month, includes lines, channels & bundled minutes:
- DIY Core: $23.91/month
  2 lines · 2 channels · 500 bundled min/month (AUS & NZ calls)
- Business: $47.83/month
  5 lines · 5 channels · 1,000 bundled min/month (AUS & NZ calls)
- Managed: $95.65/month
  10 lines · 10 channels · 2,000 bundled min/month (AUS & NZ calls)
- 30-day free trial · no lock-in contracts
- Activation: up to 24 hours after signup
- Additional lines/channels available on request
- SIP Trunks: $7.00/channel/month
- Direct Numbers (DDI): $8.00/number/month
- Toll Free: $18.00/month
- Outbound call rates: from $0.12/min
- Full details: https://www.click2call.com.au/pricing.html

## Customer Access

- **Existing Customer Login (Portal)**: [https://portal.click2call.com.au/login.php](https://portal.click2call.com.au/login.php) — Log in to manage your phone system, users, call routing, and settings.
- **New Customer Signup Form**: [https://portal.click2call.com.au/join/](https://portal.click2call.com.au/join/) — Complete the signup form to activate a new phone system. Note: new phone systems require a completed signup form and take up to 24 hours to activate after submission.

## Contact

- **Sales & Enquiries**: 1300 884 879 or click2call@bcomservices.com
- **Customer Portal**: [https://portal.click2call.com.au](https://portal.click2call.com.au)

## Help Centre

The Click2Call Help Centre provides step-by-step guides for managing your Cloud PBX phone system via the customer portal at portal.click2call.com.au.

- **Help Centre Index**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/help/](https://www.click2call.com.au/help/) - Browse all how-to guides by category.

### Getting Started
- **Activating Your Account**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-activate-account.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-activate-account.html) - What to expect after signing up and how to access your portal for the first time.
- **Adding Account Credit**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-add-account-credit.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-add-account-credit.html) - How to top up your account balance. Click2Call operates on a pre-pay system; credit must be loaded before using paid features.

### Phone Numbers
- **Adding a Phone Number**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-add-phone-number.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-add-phone-number.html) - How to add a new Australian Direct Dial Number (DDI) to your account.
- **Porting an Existing Number**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-port-number.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-port-number.html) - How to transfer your existing phone number to the Click2Call network.

### Extensions & Users
- **Adding an Extension**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-add-extension.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-add-extension.html) - How to create a new extension for a team member.
- **Adding a New User**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-add-user.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-add-user.html) - How to create a new user account and send them their login credentials.

### Phones & Devices
- **Adding a Desk Phone**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-add-desk-phone.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-add-desk-phone.html) - How to add and provision a physical desk phone.
- **Setting Up a Softphone**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-set-up-softphone.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-set-up-softphone.html) - How to configure a softphone app on a computer or mobile device.

### Call Flows
- **Setting Up a Call Flow**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-set-up-call-flow.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-set-up-call-flow.html) - How to create an IVR / auto-attendant to route inbound calls.
- **Creating a Ring Group**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-create-ring-group.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-create-ring-group.html) - How to set up a group of extensions that ring simultaneously.
- **Configuring Business Hours**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-configure-business-hours.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-configure-business-hours.html) - How to set open and closed hours for call routing.
- **Setting Up Voicemail**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-set-up-voicemail.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-set-up-voicemail.html) - How to configure voicemail-to-email delivery.
- **Viewing Call Recordings**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-view-call-recordings.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-view-call-recordings.html) - How to access and download recorded calls.

### Billing
- **Adding Channels**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-add-channels.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-add-channels.html) - How to add additional concurrent call channels to your account.

### AI Features
- **Setting Up the AI Receptionist**: [https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-set-up-ai-receptionist.html](https://www.click2call.com.au/help/how-to-set-up-ai-receptionist.html) - How to configure the AI Receptionist to answer and direct calls automatically.
voip-darwin: VoIP phone systems for Darwin businesses
